mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE ORDER BY status ASC, priority ASC, due_at ASC, id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND updated_at > #{since} ORDER BY updated_at ASC
SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND client_request_id = #{clientRequestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (user_id, title, note, project_id, priority, due_at, status, pomodoro_count, created_at, updated_at, completed_at, is_deleted, client_request_id, tags_json, subtasks_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{note}, #{projectId}, #{priority}, #{dueAt}, #{status}, #{pomodoroCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{isDeleted}, #{clientRequestId}, #{tagsJson}, #{subtasksJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET status = 2, is_deleted = 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE tasks SET pomodoro_count = pomodoro_count + 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
